name: Kaze Ramen House
title: Restaurant menu
summary: A single-page site for a neighborhood ramen shop — a photographed menu, the broth story, hours, and a map that makes you hungry on first scroll.
setup_questions: What's the shop's name and one-line vibe (e.g. "rich 18-hour tonkotsu, counter seating")?
What's your signature ramen plus 3-4 other menu items with prices?
What neighborhood/address are you in and what are your weekly hours?
Phone number and any Instagram or reservation link?
photo_terms: tonkotsu ramen bowl chashu soft egg overhead
steaming ramen bowl dark moody close up
japanese ramen shop interior wood counter lanterns
sections: Hero with a steaming tonkotsu bowl and 'Find us / View menu' buttons
Menu (ramen bowls, small plates/gyoza, rice bowls, drinks) with prices
Photo gallery of dishes and the room
Hours + location with embedded map and address
Footer with phone, reservations note, and social links
based_on: A neighborhood tonkotsu ramen-ya in the mold of JINYA Ramen Bar and Ippudo NY — counter seating, a tight signature menu, steaming bowls, warm wood-and-paper-lantern interior.
